allow: Bash(sshpass -p "1234" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no h2@192.168.1.6 "stty -F /dev/ttyUSB0 9600 raw && timeout 20 cat /dev/ttyUSB0")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no h2@192.168.1.6 "stty -F /dev/ttyUSB0 9600 raw && timeout 20 cat /dev/ttyUSB0")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no h2@192.168.1.6 "stty -F /dev/ttyUSB0 9600 raw && timeout 30 cat /dev/ttyUSB0")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "systemctl --user status dispenser 2>/dev/null || pm2 list 2>/dev/null || ls /home/h2/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/rpi-service/")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "pm2 list 2>/dev/null; systemctl --user list-units --type=service 2>/dev/null | grep -i disp")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "ps aux | grep -E ''node|npm'' | grep -v grep")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "ls -la /tmp/*.log 2>/dev/null; cat /proc/13922/fd/1 2>/dev/null | head -5 || ls -la /proc/13922/fd/ 2>/dev/null | head -10")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "pkill -9 node; sleep 2; cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/backend && node dist/index.js > /tmp/backend.log 2>&1 & sleep 1; cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/rpi-service && node dist/index.js > /tmp/rpi-service.log 2>&1 & echo started")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "fuser /dev/ttyUSB0 2>/dev/null | xargs -r kill -9; sleep 1; pkill -9 node; sleep 2; cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/backend && node dist/index.js > /tmp/backend.log 2>&1 & sleep 1; cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/rpi-service && node dist/index.js > /tmp/rpi-service.log 2>&1 & echo started")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/backend && node dist/index.js > /tmp/backend.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/rpi-service && node dist/index.js > /tmp/rpi-service.log 2>&1 & sleep 4; tail -15 /tmp/rpi-service.log")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "ls /tmp/*.log 2>/dev/null && ps aux | grep node | grep -v grep")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "kill 1276 1277 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/backend && nohup node dist/index.js > /tmp/backend.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/rpi-service && nohup node dist/index.js > /tmp/rpi-service.log 2>&1 & sleep 5; tail -20 /tmp/rpi-service.log")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "kill 2456; sleep 2; pkill -f ''node dist/index.js''; sleep 1; cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/backend && nohup node dist/index.js > /tmp/backend.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/rpi-service && nohup node dist/index.js > /tmp/rpi-service.log 2>&1 & echo ok")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "pkill -9 node 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/backend && nohup node dist/index.js > /tmp/backend.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/rpi-service && nohup node dist/index.js > /tmp/rpi-service.log 2>&1 &")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "cd ~/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/backend && node -e ""const db = require\(''./dist/db/database''\).default; console.log\(''cards:'', JSON.stringify\(db.prepare\(''SELECT * FROM cards''\).all\(\)\)\); console.log\(''stations:'', JSON.stringify\(db.prepare\(''SELECT * FROM stations''\).all\(\)\)\);""")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "ps aux | grep ''node.*rpi-service\\|node.*dist/index'' | grep -v grep")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "pkill -9 node; sleep 1; crontab -l 2>/dev/null; systemctl --user list-units --type=service 2>/dev/null | grep -i node; ls ~/.config/systemd/user/ 2>/dev/null")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "ls ~/.config/systemd/user/ 2>/dev/null && systemctl --user list-unit-files --type=service 2>/dev/null | grep -v disabled")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "ls /etc/systemd/system/ | grep -i disp; ls ~/.config/systemd/user/ 2>/dev/null; ls /home/h2/.config/ 2>/dev/null")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "pkill -9 -f ''Alex_dispenser_project.*node\\|node dist/index.js'' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; sudo systemctl restart dispenser-backend dispenser-rpi; sleep 3; sudo systemctl status dispenser-backend dispenser-rpi --no-pager -l | tail -20")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/rpi_key h2@192.168.1.6 "sudo journalctl -u dispenser-backend -u dispenser-rpi --since ''1 min ago'' --no-pager -l | tail -25")
Bash(sshpass -p "1234" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no h2@192.168.1.6 "sudo systemctl restart dispenser-backend.service dispenser-rpi.service && echo OK")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PasswordAuthentication=yes h2@192.168.1.6 "sudo systemctl restart dispenser-backend.service dispenser-rpi.service && echo OK")
